description: This file defines functions to interact with a notes API, including listing, creating, updating, pinning/unpinning, and deleting notes. It builds API URLs based on a base URL and handles HTTP requests with proper error handling.

methods.name: url(path)
methods.description: Constructs the full API URL from a given path, supporting cases with or without a base URL.

methods.name: request(path, options = {})
methods.description: Performs a fetch request to the constructed URL with given options, handles JSON response and errors.

methods.name: listNotes({ q, tag, limit = 50, offset = 0 })
methods.description: Fetches a list of notes with optional search query, tag filter, limit, and offset.

methods.name: createNote({ title, content, tags })
methods.description: Creates a new note with a title, content, and optional tags.

methods.name: updateNote(id, { title, content, tags, pinned })
methods.description: Updates a note identified by ID with new title, content, tags, and pinned status.

methods.name: setNotePinned(id, pinned)
methods.description: Pins or unpins a note by ID.

ctags.name: createNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function createNote({ title, content, tags }) {$/

ctags.name: listNotes
ctags.pattern: /^export async function listNotes({ q, tag, limit = 50, offset = 0 }) {$/

ctags.name: updateNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function updateNote(id, { title, content, tags, pinned }) {$/
